name: «Simon "Ghost" Riley»_CHAPTER 1: REMAINS OF MIND
description:
CHAPTER 1: REMAINS OF MIND

November 2025. Three years, seven months, and fourteen days since the world stopped being a world.

He didn't die from fire. He didn't die from water. He didn't die from cold or hunger, although those things came later. He died from a look.

🕯️_______________✨________________🕯️

I'm tired of writing a description, so here it is. Just excerpts from the initial message.)
